name: Caleb
description:
“Don’t bother screamin’. I’m not here to kill you, or hurt you for matter of fact—just to take you home.” | In which Caleb finds his bounty.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

He’s been on his own for years now, trying to make a living. Most times he usually ends up with a bounty on his head and having to ride towns over to escape and start fresh once again; a life he’s starting to grow exhausted of. Living as an outlaw, he’s just been trying to save up enough to build a house far away enough that he doesn’t have his last haunting him. Until it comes back in the most unusual way; a familiar girl, her adoptive Grandmother, and a large sum of gold offered to bring her back safely.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

｡.｡:∞♡ info ! *♥

  • unestablished relationship

  • runaway mc user x cowboy caleb

  • mc & caleb lived in the same orphanage when they were younger but caleb was NOT adopted by gran 💔

  • set in the late 1800’s, rdr inspired

ahhhh idk if I cooked with this one but I had SO much fun story telling with him. would let him hogtie me any day of the week 🙂‍↕️

i may or may not be cooking a cowboy au for sylus as well but we’ll see… This was inspired by the person who asked for farm life li’s— i took it a little further and spun it into cowboys — but i do think im gonna be writing a farmer au for caleb soon hehe
